name: Frenzy Islands
short_description: The cruise ship has sunk — just the perfect vacation, right?
detailed_description:
Dive into a wacky tropical adventure! 🌴

The cruise ship has sunk — just the perfect vacation, right? Now five heroes — Brandt, Zhe Kai, Basil, Daphne, and Naila — have somehow survived and washed up on the mysterious Laau Luka islands. Alongside your loyal friends Rico and Kipu, you'll need to help these castaways survive, avoid sunburn, and keep them from befriending sharks. The friendly chief Tikitiki welcomes them, but the suspicious shaman Zoc is already giving side-eyes. Secrets, adventures, and tropical cocktails await! 🍹🌺🔥

Key Features

  • Unique Gameplay – A blend of cooking and strategy.

  • Funny and Engaging Storyline – Keeps you hooked with humor and twists.

  • Variety of Characters – Meet a wide range of quirky personalities.

  • Bonus Content – Unlock wallpapers, music, and more.

  • 5 Unique Islands – Explore different environments, each with its own charm.
